title: Suspect, 18, held over drugs in Knysna
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Members of the police Garden...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Members of the police Garden Route Crime Combating Team arrested an 18-year-old suspect in Hornlee, Knysna, on Wednesday 11 September, on a charge of dealing in drugs.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Members of the police Garden Route Crime Combating Team arrested an 18-year-old suspect in Hornlee, Knysna, on Wednesday 11 September, on a charge of dealing in drugs."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"According to Sergeant Christopher Spies, Southern Cape police media liaison officer, the officers, deployed at crime hot-spots during mid-week operations, went to a house in Dassie Street, Hornlee, and while searching the premises, allegedly discovered 51 Mandrax tablets, \"10 halves and 5 grams\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The 18-year-old was arrested and the drugs seized.","html":"The 18-year-old was arrested and the drugs seized."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The suspect would appear in court once formally charged.","html":"The suspect would appear in court once formally charged."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Suspect, 18, held over drugs in Knysna
